benefits.description: Lost 65 lbs in one year, starting from 235 lbs, reaching 170s

side_effects.description: Weight stalled since October 2025 despite being on 15mg Tirzepatide, running, Pilates, and increased water intake

protocol_notes: OP started weight at 235 lbs, lost 65 lbs in one year on Tirzepatide. Has been stalled in the 170s since October 2025. Goal weight is 160 lbs. Stopped medication for approximately 3 weeks at time of posting. Does not log food. Considering switching to Retatrutide.
